printed.name: Circles Up
printed.setup: Kneeling in upright position on carriage, facing footbar, feet against shoulder rests, arms straight by sides of body, hands in straps, palms facing forward

movement.exhale: Lift arms forward and up, rotate arms, palms face forward
movement.inhale: Circle arms out to T position, lower arms to sides of body, return to start position

cues: Bias towards posterior tilt of pelvis
Keep arms in peripheral vision when circling around
Reach overhead position prior to rotating arms
